cards.title: IGMS & Consumer Courts
cards.content:
ΓÇó IGMS: IRDAI's online portal to register complaints.
ΓÇó Consumer Protection Act 2019: Defines who is a "Consumer". Ensures fast resolution without needing an advocate.

cards.title: Consumer Court Limits (2019)
cards.content:
ΓÇó District Commission: Claims up to Γé╣50 Lakhs.
ΓÇó State Commission: Claims from Γé╣50 Lakhs to Γé╣2 Crores.
ΓÇó National Commission: Claims above Γé╣2 Crores.

items.text: Can approach if the insurer rejects a complaint or doesn't reply within 30 days.
Can award compensation up to a maximum of Γé╣30 Lakhs.
The award is binding on the INSURER, but NOT on the Insured.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: Time Limit for Ombudsman: Complaint must be made within 1 year of the insurer's rejection.
Fee: Approaching the Insurance Ombudsman is completely FREE of cost.
Recommendation: The Ombudsman gives a recommendation first. If accepted by the insured within 15 days, the insurer must comply in 15 days.
Award Time: If a recommendation fails, the Ombudsman passes an Award within 3 months.
No lawyer or advocate is required to represent a case before the Ombudsman.
